title: StackReference
description: StackReference documents stack reference material for Pulumi in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as a concept page for the iac-tool class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Output, and StackReference, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include stackreference, stack-reference, infrastructure, and iac, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / iac / pulumi / stack-reference, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
